intro.headline: Cheap today, priceless tomorrow!
intro.subline: Forever unique: Choose your piece of the largest self-portrait in art history!

usp1.title: Where it all began
usp1.imgAlt: An art student paints a huge self-portrait in oil
usp1.subtitle: An art student. A huge oil painting. One goal.
usp1.text: The world's largest self-portrait — painted by hand.

usp2.title: From canvas to the web
usp2.imgAlt: The oil painting is digitized piece by piece
usp2.subtitle: Photographed piece by piece, digitized pixel by pixel.
usp2.text: This is how paint on canvas became a digital artwork.

price.beQuick: So be quick – the earlier you buy,

bid.title: Acquire the original?
bid.description: Place your bid here. Once the last piece of the painting is sold, the original painting belongs to the highest bidder.
bid.successTitle: Thank you! Your bid has been submitted successfully.
bid.successSub: I will contact you to confirm your offer.
bid.contactNote: (I will contact you and verify your offer)

concept.title: The Concept
concept.intro: I-LAUGH-YOU is an ART project that aims to publicly discuss the relationship between Art and Capitalism.
concept.body1: The painting is a self-portrait of the artist and is sold in {{total}} different pieces. Each piece can only be sold once. The first piece is the cheapest ({{firstPrice}}). The price rises exponentially; the last piece costs {{lastPrice}}.
concept.body2: Through this system, the project aims to show how the <u>price of art evolves with popularity</u>. Most likely, the first pieces — which are the <capHighlight>cheapest</capHighlight> — will also be the <artHighlight>most beautiful/interesting</artHighlight> ones. But the more popular the project becomes, the more prestigious it is to own a piece from the artist — and so people are willing to pay a lot of money.
concept.body3: Each piece will be delivered to your home. It measures 30×40 cm.
concept.outro: Have fun discovering this (very strange) love letter to a girl who is gone forever but will never be forgotten!
